message:
fix(store,runtime,server): fix hdel borrow conflict, document MULTI dispatch order

- Fix borrow checker error in Store::hdel: capture m.is_empty() into a
  local before calling entry.touch() to avoid overlapping mutable borrows
  on entry.value and entry
- Add clear comment documenting why runtime-special commands (CONFIG, ACL,
  CLIENT, etc.) execute immediately during MULTI instead of being queued
  — EXEC replay uses dispatch_argv which doesn't handle these
- Suppress too_many_arguments clippy lint on handle_readable (8 params
  needed for event loop state threading)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
